title: Marbled's Eerie Ambience
description: A resource pack that replaces all of the music to eerie ambience
body:
## Marbled's Eerie Ambience

![Marbled's Eerie Ambience](https://i.postimg.cc/437HM31s/mea-banner.png)

Marbled's Eerie Ambience is a resource pack that replaces all of the music to eerie ambience. All music that was used is free to use and copyright free. Credits in in README.txt inside the resource pack folder.

## **Usage**

- You may use this in your modpacks, no credit required but it would be apprecated.
- You may use this in your video, no credit required but it would be appreciated.
